post.summary: Upload a file and save a record to the files collection
post.description:
Upload a file and save a record to the files collection.
Always creates a new record — use upsertFile for Gmail sync where
the same attachment may be downloaded more than once.

get.summary: Download a file by its record ID
get.description:
Download a file by its record ID.
Looks up the files collection by id, reads the binary from disk, and
returns it base64-encoded so the route layer can stream it to the client.
